name: lab_room_example
_comment: Replace maze_map with your real-room measurements.
Each row has the same number of columns. 0 = free, 1 = wall.
Row 0 is the top of the map (smallest y).
Set origin_xy_m to the world (x, y) of the centre of cell (0, 0).
start_cell and goal_cell are [row, col] indices into maze_map.
